testcase: Make sure plan stability settings are back to default
prepare a statement with SAVE option to create QUERY_METADATA bucket
statements: PREPARE SAVE FORCE p11 FROM SELECT l.c11, r.c21 FROM shellTest l LEFT JOIN shellTest r ON l.c12 = r.c22 AND l.c11 != r.c21 AND r.type = "right" WHERE l.type = "left" AND l.c11 > 2

results.name: p11
results.text: PREPARE p11 FROM SELECT l.c11, r.c21 FROM shellTest l LEFT JOIN shellTest r ON l.c12 = r.c22 AND l.c11 != r.c21 AND r.type = "right" WHERE l.type = "left" AND l.c11 > 2

testcase: Run a random query to give a chance for QUERY_METADATA to be created
statements: SELECT d1.c21 FROM shellTest d1 JOIN ( SELECT d2.c11 FROM shellTest d2 JOIN ( SELECT d3.c11 FROM shellTest AS d3 WHERE d3.type = "left") AS d10 USE NL ON d2.c11 = d10.c11 WHERE d2.c11 IS NOT MISSING) AS final USE NL ON d1.c21 = final.c11 WHERE d1.type = "right"
